name: ARIZONANS FOR OFFICIAL ENGLISH AND ROBERT D. PARK v. ARIZONA et al.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in ARIZONANS FOR OFFICIAL ENGLISH AND ROBERT D. PARK v. ARIZONA et al. (520 U.S. 43, 1996 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
